## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the conventions of its layer (C HAL style / PEP 8 + Black / ESLint + Prettier)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or debug prints left in
- [ ] `checklist.md` updated if a step is now complete
- [ ] Spec-breaking changes discussed and documented
